items.name: Cyber Robot Chairman (Mech Suit)
items.description: This robot Avatar features bright mixed-metal plating with playful chair-style shapes across the limbs and torso, giving it a unique “assembled from parts” look. Built for players who want something fun, robotic, and a little chaotic in style — like a walking scrap-built mech made from painted chairs and machinery
